name: Billy Goats
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and brown sugar until light.
2. Beat in eggs, one at a time, and vanilla extract.
3. Sift together flour, salt, and baking soda.
4. Add the sifted ingredients to the butter mixture.
5. Stir in dates and walnuts.
6. Drop rounded teaspoons of batter onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F until light brown on top, about 10 minutes.
99 calories; 4 grams fat; 36% fat. Source: Tracy Crowe McGonigle. WALDINE VAN GEFFEN VGHC42A
